titleStmt.title: SII 25.273: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 273. (A.R. No. 273 of 1908.) KARIVAḶAMVANDANALLŪR, SANKARANAYINAR KOIL TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the first prākāra of the Pālvaṇṇanāthasvāmi temple.

p.hi: Abhirāma-Varatuṅgarāma Vīra-pāṇḍya Śaka 1480, Regnal year 8 = 1558 A.D.

summary.p: The record furnishes the details of date viz., Kāḷayukti, Āvaṇi 22, ba 3, Tuesday, Pūraṭṭādi.

This inscription begins with the praśasti of the king Śrīmat Sushēṇanāthasya-mukhaliṁgasya, of the king. The king bears the surname Jaṭilavarmman Tribhuvanachchakravartti, Kōnērmaikoṇḍāṉ and title like Bhuvanēkavīraṉ, chandrakuladīpaṉ, Madhurāmahēndra, Jayanthamaṅgalapuravarādhīśvara, Kshēmāsuranārasiṁha, Kēraḷatamōdivākara, Sindhuvaṭhavānala, etc.

It refers to an order of the king (nam-kumaraṉ) recording the assignment of kāṇiyāṭchai in the name of deity Viśvanāthan, after changing the paṇḍuḍaiyār and the old name. Also mentions the accountant (nam-kāriyam) Parākrama-Pāṇḍya, etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmat suṣerānādhasya mukhapiṅgasya śāsanam Aai viṇo śivātnam ha
bhu tārāka pa khā Ādicaṇḍeśvarājñeyam śakābtam 1000 4 100 8 10n mel cellā
niṉṟa nam kumāraṉ svastiśrī gojadiḷakhavammarāna tribhuvanaccakravatti konermaikoṇ
ṭāṉ svastiśrī bhuvanekaviraṉ cantira kuḷatipaṉ madhurāmahentira centa maṅkala puravarādhiśvara
kṣemāsura nārasiṅha keraḷa tamodivākara coḷa siddhu vamvānala Abhirāma varatuṅka viraṭṭāṇḍa de
va nārāna śrī perumāḷ taṉmap perumāḷ kulacekaratevaṟku Āṇṭu 8āvatu kālayukti
varuṣam Āvaṇi mātam 2 10 2 Aparapakṣattu tritiyaiyum maṅkalavāramum dhratiyogamum vaṇijakaraṇaha
mum peṟṟa puraṭṭātiṉāḷ nam toṇṭaṉ viśvanādha nukku nam kumāraṉ Ativirarāmaṉ nam
vācal Olai yeḻuttuk kāṇiyāṭcaiyāka paṇṭuṭaiyāraiyum paḻamperaiyumāṟṟi ka
ṭṭaḷai Iṭṭu nammuṉṉe vijñāpanam ceyyaccolla namvācal k kāṟaṟku O
lai varaviṭukaiyil namkāriyam parākkiṟama pāṇṭiya mutaliyum namkāriyak kaṇakku Uṭai
yāṉum ṉaṅkammiyaṉum nam maṟaikkaṇakku Iravimākkuṭṭi kaṇṭi tevaṉu
m maṟṟu muḷḷituṟkkāṟarum kaittaṭiypaṭi Āriṉāṭu karivaranallūr
Digital edition of SII 25.273 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
